message:
feat: gt sling rejects deferred/post-launch beads (gt-1326mw)

Prevents wasting polecat slots on deferred work by checking bead status
and description for deferral indicators before dispatching. Use --force
to override when intentionally re-activating deferred work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
